response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong experience in software development, including C++ during his time at National Instruments, but his recent work heavily focuses on Node.js, TypeScript, and other modern web technologies rather than deep C++ expertise. His background aligns more with full-stack development and embedded systems rather than the high-performance, security-focused C++ role required for industrial automation. His lack of recent C++ experience and limited exposure to secure development lifecycles like IEC 62443-4-1 raises concerns about his fit for this specific role.
strengths: Strong C++ experience from National Instruments (6+ months)
Broad software development background across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in performance optimization and system design
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last significant work was 2014-2015)
No demonstrated experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443-4-1)
Lack of exposure to message brokers, REST/MQTT for IoT, or cloud platform solutions required for this role

key_factors.factor: Experience with message brokers and IoT protocols
